category_sources: source_facts.description says Icecream is a distributed compiler with a central scheduler to share build load.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the project as icecream; source_facts.homepage uses Icecream.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; its README is the main project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an official repository URL, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies distributed compilation and scheduler behavior; source_facts.executables lists icecc, iceccd, and icecc-scheduler.
